rationale: Educ. Code §37.209 governs a school safety center website and is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.209. CENTER WEBSITE. The center shall develop and maintain an interactive Internet website that includes:
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school safety website, not property tax homestead exemption.
